channel.title: The GNZ Journal — Web Design & Web Development Essays
channel.description: Daily long-form essays on web design, web development, and WordPress websites — from the desks at GNZ Enterprises.

item.title: Web Design in 2026: A Seduction Manual for the Tasteful Entrepreneur
item.description: A complete, occasionally tender playbook on modern web design — from first impression to final conversion.

item.title: Affordable Web Design for Small Businesses: A Symphony in Three Zeroes or Less
item.description: A working-class manifesto for small-business owners who want a website that respects both the budget and the beholder.

item.title: WordPress Website Mastery: How to Seduce Google Without Selling Your Soul
item.description: A love letter to the platform that runs nearly half the internet. Speed, security, SEO, and sanity.

item.title: Web Development vs. Web Design: A Pas de Deux of Pixels and Ports
item.description: One draws the face, the other makes the heart beat. A practical, semi-literary unpacking of the two crafts.

item.title: Web Design Trends 2026: What's Cooking, What's Cringe, and What's Just Rebranded CSS
item.description: A field guide to the year's most quoted, most copied, and most unfairly maligned ideas in web design.
